allow: Bash(ls /proc/65674/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l; echo "---"; readlink /proc/65674/fd/* 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "wayland|x11|display|dri|gl" | sort -u)

Bash(run-clang-tidy -p build/ 2>&1 | grep -E "warning:|error:" | grep -v "^/home/titan99/code/decade.bak/build/" | grep -v "^/home/titan99/code/decade.bak/external/" > /tmp/clang-tidy-src.txt; wc -l /tmp/clang-tidy-src.txt)
Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/clang-tidy.log | tail -5')

Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build --fix --fix-notes --checks='\\''-*,modernize-use-nodiscard,modernize-use-designated-initializers,modernize-use-integer-sign-comparison,hicpp-uppercase-literal-suffix,modernize-loop-convert,modernize-return-braced-init-list,modernize-use-ranges,llvm-use-ranges'\\'' src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/round1.log | tail -5')

Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build --extra-arg=-include --extra-arg=type_traits --fix --fix-notes   --checks='\\''-*,modernize-use-nodiscard,modernize-use-designated-initializers,modernize-use-integer-sign-comparison,hicpp-uppercase-literal-suffix,modernize-loop-convert,modernize-return-braced-init-list,modernize-use-ranges,llvm-use-ranges'\\''   src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/round1.log | tail -8')

Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build   --extra-arg=-include --extra-arg=type_traits   --extra-arg=-Wno-error --extra-arg=-Wno-unknown-warning-option   --fix --fix-notes   --checks='\\''-*,modernize-use-nodiscard,modernize-use-designated-initializers,modernize-use-integer-sign-comparison,hicpp-uppercase-literal-suffix,modernize-loop-convert,modernize-return-braced-init-list,modernize-use-ranges,llvm-use-ranges'\\''   src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/round1.log | tail -5')

Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build   --extra-arg=-include --extra-arg=type_traits   --extra-arg=-Wno-error --extra-arg=-Wno-unknown-warning-option   --fix --fix-notes   --checks='\\''-*,misc-const-correctness,cppcoreguidelines-use-default-member-init,cppcoreguidelines-prefer-member-initializer,cppcoreguidelines-init-variables'\\''   src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/round2.log | tail -5')

Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build   --extra-arg=-include --extra-arg=type_traits   --extra-arg=-Wno-error --extra-arg=-Wno-unknown-warning-option   --fix --fix-notes   --checks='\\''-*,readability-implicit-bool-conversion,readability-simplify-boolean-expr,readability-math-missing-parentheses,readability-else-after-return,readability-container-contains,readability-redundant-access-specifiers,readability-make-member-function-const,readability-use-concise-preprocessor-directives,hicpp-braces-around-statements,google-explicit-constructor,performance-avoid-endl,performance-unnecessary-value-param'\\''   src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/round3.log | tail -5')

Bash(bash -c 'shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build   --extra-arg=-include --extra-arg=type_traits   --extra-arg=-Wno-error --extra-arg=-Wno-unknown-warning-option   --fix --fix-notes   --checks='\\''-*,bugprone-misplaced-widening-cast,bugprone-branch-clone,readability-convert-member-functions-to-static'\\''   src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/round4.log | tail -5')
Bash(bash -c "shopt -s globstar; clang-tidy -p build src/**/*.cpp src/**/*.hpp 2>&1 | tee build/clang-tidy.log | tail -3")
